allow: Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('typescript'\); const config = ts.readConfigFile\('tsconfig.json', ts.sys.readFile\); const parsed = ts.parseJsonConfigFileContent\(config.config, ts.sys, '.'\); const program = ts.createProgram\(parsed.fileNames, parsed.options\); const diags = ts.getPreEmitDiagnostics\(program\); diags.forEach\(d => { if\(d.file\) { const {line} = d.file.getLineAndCharacterOfPosition\(d.start\); console.log\(d.file.fileName + ':' + \(line+1\) + ' ' + ts.flattenDiagnosticMessageText\(d.messageText, '\\n'\)\); } else { console.log\(ts.flattenDiagnosticMessageText\(d.messageText, '\\n'\)\); }}\); console.log\('Total errors:', diags.length\);")
Bash(node -e "try { require\('./components/LandingDemoWidget.tsx'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Syntax check via import not possible for TSX, checking with swc...'\) }")
